notes: Decomposed into four angles — incident/lawsuit news, hallucination/sycophancy product failures, regulatory/liability tailwinds (AB 1988, FTC), and community discourse — because Alice's John Oliver narrative needs both the raw incident signal AND the public outrage layer; grounding and X dominate for press-worthy breaking stories while reddit/hackernews surface the practitioner and consumer sentiment that feeds Alice's research-first POV.
